decision: SKIP — DUPLICATE of an already-submitted application

reasoning: The harvest entry's linkedin_url/jid is byte-identical to the posting already submitted on 2026-06-13. This is the SAME live req, not a new/different one. Re-applying would create a duplicate application to the same requisition — explicitly to be avoided per the dedup instruction. Therefore SKIP.
quality_debt_note: The prior submission used Jamie's BASE resume (the MCP-upload sandbox blocked the tailored PDF at the time), not an L&D-tailored variant. A tailored resume would have been a quality upgrade, BUT submitting it now to the same req = a duplicate application, which is a worse outcome than the existing generic-resume submission. The application of record stands. No action taken.
no_action: No package built, no ATS opened, nothing submitted.
